case_title: LORI H LEVY VS. SYDNEY P DAY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-17-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEVY, LORI H RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAY, SYDNEY P $2,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,490.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY DAY, SYDNEY P LEVY, LORI H
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JUN-24-2015 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT AFFIRMED. THE MOTION TO VACATE WAS CORRECTLY DENIED. THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF APR.-17-2015 REMAINS THE SAME. THIS JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JUN-24-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUNE-24-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID H. S. COMMINS, CLERK J. KONG, NOT REPORTED, D525.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT LEVY, LORI H RECOVER FROM APPELLANT DAY, SYDNEY P $2,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,490.00, THE SMALL CLAIMS COURT DENIED APPELLANT'S MOTION TO VACATE AND THIS APPEAL FOLLOWED. THE COURT, HAVING HEARD THE PARTIES, DENIES THE APPEAL. THE MOTION TO VACATE WAS CORRECTLY DENIED. NO EXHIBITS FILED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO APPELLANT DAY, SYDNEY P
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE: $40.00 SERVED MAR-02-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DAY, SYDNEY P

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-17-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-17-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY SYDNEY P DAY ON MAY-07-2015 - DENIED. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-26-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Wednesday 24, 2015 in Department 525:
Lori H. Levy, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as Propria Persona with witness Matthew Green.
Sydney P. Day, Appellant/Defendant appears in Propria Persona.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witness are sworn.
The Court asks Ms. Day to give a reason why she should be granted the Denial of the Motion to Vacate. Ms. Day present her reason and submit evidence - not marked - traveling information. The reason having been submitted, the court takes the denial of the motion under submission and hears the matter of the claim.

Plaintiff/Respondent, Lori Levy testifies on her own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced: Not Marked - lease agreement, VRBO listing of rental.

Defendant/Appellant, Sydney Day testifies on her own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced: Not Marked - 1/28/2015 e-mail.

Parties respond to the questions from the Court.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly evidence returned to the parties by the Court.

Judge Pro Tem David H. S. Commins; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-07-2015 Denied

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Apr-17-2015 Judgment Entered
